ddls:
CREATE TABLE "internal_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the OpenGL internal format */,
  "base_format" TEXT /* Base format of the internal format */,
  "red_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits for the red color channel */,
  "green_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits for the green color channel */,
  "blue_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits for the blue color channel */,
  "alpha_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits for the alpha channel */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., unsigned byte, float) stored in the format */,
  "srgb" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the format supports sRGB color space */,
  "depth_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits for the depth channel */,
  "stencil_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits for the stencil channel */,
  "compressed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the format is compressed */,
  "mipmap_support" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the format supports mipmapping */,
  "anisotropic_filtering" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the format supports anisotropic filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internal_formats_base_format FOREIGN KEY ("base_format") REFERENCES base_formats ("base_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "base_formats" (
  "base_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each base format */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the base format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the base format */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., unsigned byte, float) associated with the base format */,
  "srgb" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the base format supports sRGB color space */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the base format supports depth */,
  "stencil" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the base format supports stencil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "texture_formats" (
  "texture_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each texture format */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the texture format */,
  "compression" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format supports compression */,
  "mipmap_support" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format supports mipmapping */,
  "anisotropic_filtering" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format supports anisotropic filtering */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internal format used by the texture format */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., unsigned byte, float) stored in the texture format */,
  "srgb" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the texture format supports sRGB color space */,
  "depth_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits for the depth channel in the texture format */,
  "stencil_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits for the stencil channel in the texture format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("texture_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texture_formats_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES internal_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internal format */,
  "usage" TEXT /* Usage guidelines for the format */,
  "limitations" TEXT /* Limitations of the format */,
  "best_practices" TEXT /* Best practices for using the format */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of how to use the format */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Performance impact of using the format */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Hardware and software compatibility of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_documentation_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES internal_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, artist, QA) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., texture, rendering) */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is deprecated */,
  "deprecated_since_version" TEXT /* Version number when the feature was deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  "is_revoked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission has been revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES engine_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the graphics engine */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* List of changes in the version */,
  "major_version" INTEGER /* Major version number */,
  "minor_version" INTEGER /* Minor version number */,
  "patch_version" INTEGER /* Patch version number */,
  "is_major_release" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if it is a major release */,
  "is_minor_release" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if it is a minor release */,
  "is_patch_release" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if it is a patch release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
